hero.subtitle: Same-day junk removal for homes, businesses, and construction projects. We lift, load, and haul so you don't have to.

services.subtitle: No job is too big or small. From single items to full property cleanouts.

residential.copy: We remove unwanted items from your home quickly and efficiently.

commercial.copy: Reliable junk removal for businesses and commercial properties.

yard.copy: Keep your outdoor spaces clean and clutter-free.

construction.copy: Fast cleanup for remodeling and construction projects.

cleanout.copy: Complete property cleanout solutions for any situation.

furniture.copy: We safely remove furniture of all sizes.

appliances.copy: Responsible disposal and recycling of old appliances.

recycling.copy: We strive to keep reusable items out of landfills whenever possible.

about.paragraph: We understand that junk accumulates, but removing it shouldn't be a headache. Julio Junk provides a premium, worry-free removal experience.

benefits.title: Same-Day Service
benefits.copy: Book by noon, gone by dusk.

benefits.title: Eco-Friendly Service
benefits.copy: We donate and recycle before heading to the landfill.

benefits.title: Fast & Reliable
benefits.copy: We show up on time, every time.

benefits.title: Residential & Commercial
benefits.copy: No matter the size of the job.

howItWorks.subtitle: The easiest way to reclaim your space.

steps.title: Request
steps.copy: Call or click to get your free, no-obligation estimate.

steps.title: Schedule
steps.copy: Pick a two-hour window that works best for your schedule.

steps.title: Removed
steps.copy: We arrive, confirm the final price, and haul everything away.

steps.title: Clean
steps.copy: We sweep the area, leaving you with a fresh, clear space.

pricing.subtitle: We charge by volume — how much space it takes in our truck. No hidden fees, no surprises.

tiers.name: Single Item
tiers.example: A single sofa, refrigerator, mattress, or similar item.

tiers.name: Medium Load
tiers.example: Up to ¼ truck — great for garage or room cleanouts.

tiers.name: Full Load
tiers.example: Full truck — perfect for complete property cleanouts.

pricing.includes: All prices include labor, transport, and disposal fees. Free on-site estimate, no obligation to book.
pricing.footNote: Large or commercial job? Call us for a custom quote.

testimonials.subtitle: See why we're the top-rated removal service in the area.

reviews.text: Julio and his team were fantastic! They arrived exactly on time, were incredibly respectful of our home, and cleared our entire basement in under two hours. Highly recommend!
reviews.author: Sarah Mitchell

reviews.text: As a property manager, I need reliable vendors. Julio Junk is my go-to for every cleanout. They are efficient, professional, and their pricing is always fair. Five stars every time.
reviews.author: James Davis

reviews.text: Needed a massive pile of yard waste and old construction debris removed. They gave me a quote over the phone and were here within 4 hours. Exceptional service!
reviews.author: Robert King

serviceAreas.paragraph: We provide junk removal services throughout the area and surrounding communities. Not sure if we reach your location? Give us a call!
serviceAreas.label: Service available in:
serviceAreas.cta: Do you serve my area? Call us
serviceAreas.note: We also serve additional communities — don't hesitate to ask.

items.q: How do you charge for junk removal?
items.a: We charge based on the volume of junk you need removed — how much space it takes up in our truck. The price includes all labor, transport, and disposal fees. We provide free, no-obligation on-site estimates.

items.q: What items can you NOT take?
items.a: We cannot haul hazardous materials such as chemicals, gasoline, oil, paints, solvents, or asbestos. For everything else — furniture, tires, electronics — we've got you covered!

items.q: Do I need to be present during the removal?
items.a: We prefer you to be there to confirm items and the final price, but it's not strictly required. If items are accessible (curbside or in a driveway) and payment is arranged, we can handle everything while you're away.

items.q: What happens to my junk after it's removed?
items.a: We're committed to eco-friendly practices. We sort through everything we haul — donating usable items to local charities and recycling as much as possible before heading to the landfill.
Yes! We offer same-day service based on availability. Book before noon and we can be there before dusk. Call to confirm availability.
Absolutely. Julio Junk Removal is fully licensed and insured. Your property is protected throughout the entire removal process.
Yes! We operate 7 days a week, including weekends and most holidays. Call to schedule at your convenience.

items.q: How long does the service take?
items.a: Most residential jobs are completed in 1–2 hours. Larger cleanouts or commercial jobs may take longer. We'll give you a time estimate when you schedule.

finalCta.h2: Ready to Reclaim Your Space Today?
finalCta.paragraph: Get a free estimate in minutes. No pressure, just professional junk removal service at your door.
finalCta.note: Also available on WhatsApp · Response in under 1 hour

footer.tagline: Junk removal services for residential and commercial properties. We make decluttering effortless.

contactForm.subtitle: Fill out the form and we'll get back to you within 1 hour.
contactForm.successMessage: We'll contact you within 1 hour to confirm your appointment.
contactForm.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please call us directly.
